summary: MedPro (Berkshire Co.) | Staging Site uses Okta but goes to default log-in screen
description: The Staging site for MedPro (Berkshire Co.) was recently upgraded to v5.1.4. However, during client testing, they discovered that the site continues to redirect to the default login screen. Although logging in via Okta SSO is successful, it still prompts for their old RCT logins. Is there a way to bypass the RCT login requirement?
resolution_comments: Moved to Sub Task

summary: Pharmacist Mutual Staging : H - Underwriter`s signature is not transferred to the letter
description: Environment: Pharmacist Mutual Staging - Heritage https://pharmacist-staging.riskcontrol.expert/RCI/Portal.bsd?ssouser=administrator Version: 5.2 Issue: Underwriter`s signature is not transferred to the letter Steps to reproduce: Login to Heritage Click on the Tasks on the top navigation bar Click on any task Click on Letter section on the task overview Choose the letter template Click on Load button Open the letter in word/pdf Expected Result : The Letter is generated and all relevant data are displayed Actual Result: Underwriter`s signature is missing
resolution_comments: Closed by executing script provided from DEV Eng in ticket: https://riskcontroltech.atlassian.net/browse/ZEN-2765

summary: 5.2 AF Group: H/RH: Run Report and Letter templates throw 404 and cannot be opened in PDF
description: When trying to open a PDF letter or Run Report I get 404 error message. Word however is successfully opened. Issue is present in RiskHub as well. Steps to reproduce: go to heritage go to tasks listing page open a task click the Run Report button - 404 error click the letters page choose a letter and click load scroll down and click the pdf preview button - 404 error Checked all letters assigned and all gave the 404 error.
resolution_comments: Solved by changing the query in the database, details are described in the comment.

summary: 5.2 Society - H/RH - Photo from the recs is not transferred to the letter
description: Environment: Society Staging - Heritage/Risk Hub - https://staging.riskcontrol.expert/Society-Upgrade/Portal.bsd?ssouser=administrator https://riskhub-staging.riskcontrol.expert/Society-Upgrade/#/main/activities Version: 5.2 Issue: Generate letter - Photos from the recs are not displayed in the letter Steps to reproduce: Login to Heritage/Risk Hub Click on the Tasks on the top navigation bar Click on any task with recs Click on Letter section on the left menu Click on Generate Letter button Fill necessary fields Click on Create button Open the letter in word/pdf Expected Result : The Letter is generated, and all relevant data are displayed Actual Result: Photos from the recs are not displayed in the letter
resolution_comments: Added missing ExtFld13 and ExtFld14 in DB, necessary for displaying pictures.

summary: 5.2 Society Staging - Cannot add a recommendation to a form
description: Environment: Society Staging – Risk Hub https://riskhub-staging.riskcontrol.expert/Society-Upgrade/#/main/activities Version: Risk Hub 5.2 Issue: Cannot add recommendation with or without files Steps to Reproduce: Log in to Risk Hub. Click on the Activities in the top navigation bar. Navigate to any activity by clicking on its reference number. Select an existing form or add a new one. Click on the Recommendation section. Click on the Add Recommendation button. Fill in all necessary fields. Expected Result: All recommendation fields are displayed. Actual Result: Not all recommendation fields are displayed, and an infinite spinner is shown.
resolution_comments: Updated field Recommendation title in DB. Value set to 1 as expected in code.

summary: 5.2 Society - H/RH - Slow system performance
description: Environment: Society Staging – Heritage/Risk Hub Version: 5.2 Issue: The system experienced significant slowness for most of the time, with search and loading processes taking unusually long. The longer the application is used, the slower it becomes. Steps to reproduce: Login to the Heritage/Risk Hub Go to Quality Reports tab in the top header Check the duration of the API call Go to the Maintenance tab Click on the Contacts/Address Check the duration of the API call Actual result: Listing takes an unusually long time to load. Expected result: Listing is loaded within the usual/normal time.
resolution_comments: This problem was solved by resizing the server.

summary: 5.2 MEM /H: Custom Evaluation template does not evaluate values
description: There is an issue with the Custom Evaluation template. When created and added it does not valuate the Output field. However, a warning in the excel document appears which I'm seeing it for the first time telling me about that the calculations may not work as expected. Screenshots are provided. Steps to reproduce: go to heritage go to maintenance go to task templates create a new template using the steps from the test case: [CLOUD-2672] Create a Form with Custom Evaluation - Risk Control Technologies Inc. - JIRA after all steps are completed for creation of the template add it to a task populate the input field with a random number and click the calculate values button Expected result: the value in the output field should be populated using the formula from the test case Actual result: No value is calculated, and the output field is left unpopulated

summary: 5.1.8.3 SAIF Prod/ RH: Cannot create activities
description: When trying to create an activity a validation error occurs and creation of activity fails. This issue is previously reported on staging and tickets will be linked here. The validation issue is fixed with version 5.2 Steps to reproduce: go to account listing page open an account click the add activity button fill all the mandatory fields follow the steps click the create button - Validation error ​Expected result: Activity should be created Actual result: Validation error and activity is not created
resolution_comments: A fix for this problem is in version 5.2. For fix client need to upgrade environment to v5.2

summary: SAIF - PreClientPlugin/Rules are missing in Evolution
description: Summary : After upgrade, the rules aren’t running in Evolution. Initially, the evolution logs stopped working as well. We have modified the EvolutionImportConsole.exe.config to fix the logging. It started generating logs again today Dec 19, 2025 and it has been determined that the PreClientPlugin or Rules are not being executed. It was working on Dec 15, 2025 before the upgrade. This is how it looks like before the upgrade: And this is how it looks like after the upgrade: I have attached the copy of the evolution logs from Dec 15, 2025 and Dec 19, 2025
resolution_comments: Missing files.

summary: ERIE/ RH: Recs not transferred to letter- base bug
description: recs are not transferred to letter Steps to reproduce: go to activities listing page open an activity create a rec with images go to letter section generate a letter - qa template for testing click ellipses and click preview check if recs are transferred - recs not transferred https://riskcontroltech.atlassian.net/browse/CLOUD5-5486 https://riskcontroltech.atlassian.net/browse/ZEN-2618
resolution_comments: Bug linked to #49240 to ensure ongoing tracking and resolution.

summary: SMSC STG H - Setting task status to Scheduled - The date picker is not being displayed
description: Environment: SMSC Staging RC Inspection - Risk Control Version: Heritage 5.2 Issue: Date picker is missing Steps to Reproduce: Login to Heritage site Navigate to Tasks Listing Page by clicking Tasks at the top navigation bar Open a Task by clicking the Reference No. of the Task Set the Status drop-down to Scheduled Click Save Click OK when the pop-up asks, “Do you want to schedule service?” In the Type of Visit drop-down list choose any option Click Save Observe the “Invalid date” message displayed on the screen Expected Result: After selecting the visit type, the date picker should be displayed so the user can select the date. Actual Result The date picker is not being displayed. Jira ticket link: https://riskcontroltech.atlassian.net/browse/UP-1608
resolution_comments: This is not an issue

summary: Sompo: H/RH: Save and edit buttons are not working properly
description: CLIENT NAME AND ENVIRONMENT - Sompo Staging Current Version : 5.1.9 Expected Version: 5.2.0.1 URL: https://staging.riskcontrol.expert/Sompo/Portal.bsd?ssouser=administrator -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- When trying to save or save with rules a new service on Heritage or try to edit a service through extension fields on RiskHub, the buttons are not clickable. The edit button is missing on extension fields on RiskHub, and editing through ellipses is not possible as well. Heritage Steps to reproduce: go to Accounts listing page open an account click Add New Service fill the input fields click Save or Save with Rules - buttons Not clickable and not responding Expected result: Buton should be clickable and a new service should be created Actual result: Buttons are not responsive and not clickable When you try to edit an already created service the through the Edit Summary button a message appears that the service is not availbale. ------------------------------------------------- RiskHub Steps to reproduce: go to activities Listing page click the ellipses try to edit the fields - fields are not editable Go to Activities listing page open an activity scroll down to edit the extension fields click the edit button - no edit button present Expected results: Editing through ellipses should be possible and edit button on extension fields should be present Actual Results: Editing through ellipses is not possible and edit button is not present on extension fields

summary: 5.2.0.1 SOMPO STG - RH - Recommendations are transferred to the letter, but photos appear to be cut off in PDF Preview
description: Environment: SOMPO STG https://riskhub-staging.riskcontrol.expert/Sompo/#/main Version: Risk Hub 5.2.0.1 Issue: Recommendations are transferred to the letter, but one photo appears to be cut off in PDF Preview Steps to reproduce: Login to Risk Hub Click on the Tasks on the top navigation bar Click on any task with recs Click on Letter section on the left menu Click on Generate Letter button Fill necessary fields Click on Create button Open the letter in pdf Expected Result : The Letter is generated and all relevant data are displayed along with REC photos correctly aligned with letter. Actual Result: Recommendations are transferred to the letter, but one photo appears to be cut off
resolution_comments: Change in web.config file.

summary: Sompo Prod: Audo Due Date for recommendation show wrong dates
description: Due dates presented in maintenance for the admin contact are not correct when creating a recommendation. For Advisory, Critical and Important the date is changing in the due date filed, but it is wrong and for the certificate blocking and non-certificate blocking options, the dates are not changing at all. This is in relation to: Ticket: [Development] Permissions Mismatch… – Risk Control Technologies – Zendesk where we had the following ZEN [ZEN-2664] Sompo/ H: Audo Due Date for recommendation throws wrong dates - Risk Control Technologie… Dmitry deployed a script to fix the issue, please apply the same Please make sure to take a database backup before any changes Login into RC Inspection - Risk Control Steps to reproduce: go to maintenance > contact > admin check the due dates for recommendation next go to services open a service create a rec and circle through the severity options when selected a severity option, the due date should automatically change to the days presented in maintenance - dates are not right See wrong Rec Due Date
resolution_comments: Executed script ZEN-2548_v4 and retested.

summary: Copperpoint STG :Caption changes after upgrade
description: Steps to view Login to Copperpoint STG https://copperpoint-staging.riskcontrol.expert/Portal.bsd See the following changed captions in accounts and task listings Task Number instead of Reference Number LC Consultant instead of Risk Control Professional Account instead of Client/Insured PROD STG Account Number instead of Policy No. Date Closed instead of Date Completed PROD STG
resolution_comments: checked the captions on both STG and Prod and observed the captions on Prod was updated Manually by someone hence it is not going to match with STG also, devops team never change captions manually they get populated using Octopus now copper point was upgraded using Jenkins so there no chance that will changed after the upgrade. Please check the CustomOptions. BSD file from which Captions get loaded before and after the Upgrade.

summary: Af Group/ H: PDF Preview and Run Report throw 404 error
description: Steps to reproduce: go to Heritage open a task go to letter section generate QA TEMPLATE FOR TESTING letter click PDF preview Error 404 Expected results: pdf and Run Report Actual Results: Error 404
resolution_comments: This issue has occurred because of TA or an user added a field on table OpenClosedRecFields. the FieldName is duplicate Support team needs to be aware that manual adding fields in database can cause error such as this. check below screenshot showing duplicate fieldName now I have renamed to ExtFld22 ensuring its uniqueness. This change successfully restored the PDF letter and Run Report generation functionality.

summary: AF Group: An error occurs when clicking on Maintenance > Address
description: When you click on address from maintenance an error occurs Steps to reproduce: go to Heritage site go to maintenance click on address from the side menu - Error Expected result: You should enter the address page actual result: Error message
resolution_comments: Yesterday for the whole day it wasn't working. Today i have retested it and its working

summary: Protective STG 5.2 - H -The Form Overview is not opening.
description: Environment: Protective STG https://protective-upgrade-staging.riskcontrol.expert/Portal.bsd Version: Heritage 5.2 Issue: The Form overview is not opening Steps to Reproduce: Log in to Heritage Navigate to Tasks listing by clicking on the Tasks on the top navigation bar. Navigate to any task by clicking on a task number Click on the add Form button Fill in all mandatory fields Click on the Save button Expected Result: The Form is added, and the form overview is displayed. Actual Result: The form is added, but the form overview is not shown and an infinite loading indicator is displayed on the screen . This happens when opening already existing forms as well as newly added ones
resolution_comments: Retarted JAWS app pool.
